name: VitaNova Life Sciences Corp
summary: Yijia Group Corp. (operating as VitaNova Life Sciences Corp) is a Nevada corporation providing two business segments: consulting advisory services in management, accounting, and finance; and healthcare products and services through its wholly owned subsidiary Nutripeak Trading Corporation. Core healthcare products are anti-aging supplements that boost NAD+ levels to promote anti-aging, energy metabolism, cognitive function, and cellular repair, complemented by personalized health consultation and nutrition planning services.
